languages.original_text: "Hatred, Mistress Heydari. By musing on the xenos' mutilating experiments and recalling the components of my construction, I diverted my mind from the pain. But it was hatred that stopped me from surrendering."

languages.text: "Ненависть, госпожа Хейдари. Я занимал разум размышлениями об изуверских опытах ксеноса и воспоминаниями о своем устройстве, чтобы не думать о боли. Но лишь ненависть не позволила мне сдаться".

"Hatred, Mistress Heydari. By musing on the xenos' mutilating experiments and recalling the components of my construction, I diverted my mind from the pain. But it was hatred that stopped me from surrendering."
languages.original_text: "Ненависть, госпожа Хейдари. Я занимал разум размышлениями об изуверских опытах ксеноса и воспоминаниями о своем устройстве, чтобы не думать о боли. Но лишь ненависть не позволила мне сдаться".

traits.locale_text: "Hatred, Mistress Heydari. By musing on the xenos' mutilating experiments and recalling the components of my construction, I diverted my mind from the pain. But it was hatred that stopped me from surrendering."

"Hatred, Mistress Heydari. By musing on the xenos' mutilating experiments and recalling the components of my construction, I diverted my mind from the pain. But it was hatred that stopped me from surrendering."

"Hatred, Mistress Heydari. By musing on the xenos' mutilating experiments and recalling the components of my construction, I diverted my mind from the pain. But it was hatred that stopped me from surrendering."

languages.text: «Odio, señora Heydari. Al reflexionar sobre los experimentos mutiladores de los xenos y recordar los componentes de mi construcción, alejé a mi mente del dolor. Pero fue el odio lo que evitó que me rindiera».
languages.original_text: "Hatred, Mistress Heydari. By musing on the xenos' mutilating experiments and recalling the components of my construction, I diverted my mind from the pain. But it was hatred that stopped me from surrendering."

traits.locale_text: «Odio, señora Heydari. Al reflexionar sobre los experimentos mutiladores de los xenos y recordar los componentes de mi construcción, alejé a mi mente del dolor. Pero fue el odio lo que evitó que me rindiera».

languages.text: 「憎しみです、ヘイダリ女史。異種族の切り刻むような実験に思いを巡らせ、自らの構造の構成要素を思い起こすことで、私は痛みから意識をそらしました。しかし、私が屈するのを押しとどめたのは、憎しみだったのです」
languages.original_text: "Hatred, Mistress Heydari. By musing on the xenos' mutilating experiments and recalling the components of my construction, I diverted my mind from the pain. But it was hatred that stopped me from surrendering."

traits.locale_text: 「憎しみです、ヘイダリ女史。異種族の切り刻むような実験に思いを巡らせ、自らの構造の構成要素を思い起こすことで、私は痛みから意識をそらしました。しかし、私が屈するのを押しとどめたのは、憎しみだったのです」

languages.text: “仇恨，海达利女士。我将思维专注于对异形残忍解剖实验的思考，以及对我自身构造的各个部件的回想，这才得以将思绪从痛苦中转移开。而正是这份仇恨，让我没有屈服。”
languages.original_text: "Hatred, Mistress Heydari. By musing on the xenos' mutilating experiments and recalling the components of my construction, I diverted my mind from the pain. But it was hatred that stopped me from surrendering."

traits.locale_text: “仇恨，海达利女士。我将思维专注于对异形残忍解剖实验的思考，以及对我自身构造的各个部件的回想，这才得以将思绪从痛苦中转移开。而正是这份仇恨，让我没有屈服。”

languages.text: "Hass, Meisterin Heydari. Als ich über verstümmelnden Experimente des Xenos nachgrübelte und mir die Komponenten meiner Konstruktion in Erinnerung rief, lenkte ich meinen Verstand vom Schmerz ab. Aber es war Hass, der mich davon abhielt, aufzugeben."
languages.original_text: "Hatred, Mistress Heydari. By musing on the xenos' mutilating experiments and recalling the components of my construction, I diverted my mind from the pain. But it was hatred that stopped me from surrendering."

traits.locale_text: "Hass, Meisterin Heydari. Als ich über verstümmelnden Experimente des Xenos nachgrübelte und mir die Komponenten meiner Konstruktion in Erinnerung rief, lenkte ich meinen Verstand vom Schmerz ab. Aber es war Hass, der mich davon abhielt, aufzugeben."

languages.text: « La haine, maîtresse Heydari. En réfléchissant aux expériences sanglantes des xénos et en me rappelant les composants de ma structure, j'ai détourné mon attention de la souffrance. Mais c'est la haine qui m'a empêché de céder. »
languages.original_text: "Hatred, Mistress Heydari. By musing on the xenos' mutilating experiments and recalling the components of my construction, I diverted my mind from the pain. But it was hatred that stopped me from surrendering."

traits.locale_text: « La haine, maîtresse Heydari. En réfléchissant aux expériences sanglantes des xénos et en me rappelant les composants de ma structure, j'ai détourné mon attention de la souffrance. Mais c'est la haine qui m'a empêché de céder. »

languages.text: "Nefret Üstat Heydari. Zenonun o sakatlayıcı deneyleri üzerine kafa yorup yapımın bileşenlerini hatırlayarak zihnimi acıdan uzaklaştırdım. Ancak pes etmemi engelleyen şey nefretti."
languages.original_text: "Hatred, Mistress Heydari. By musing on the xenos' mutilating experiments and recalling the components of my construction, I diverted my mind from the pain. But it was hatred that stopped me from surrendering."
